messages.content: summarize this document in 5 points

Here is a 5-point summary of the document:

1.  Saral Gupta demonstrates strong competitive programming skills with a maximum Codeforces rating of 1435 and CodeChef rating of 1792, having solved over 90,000 problems across various platforms and possessing strong proficiency in C++ and Data Structures & Algorithms (Source 1).
2.  Developed a CNN-based hybrid house price prediction model at IIT Roorkee, achieving an R² of approximately 0.86 by integrating satellite images and tabular features, and automating satellite image acquisition via ArcGIS REST API (Source 1, Source 3).
3.  Designed and implemented a C-based memory simulator at IIT Roorkee, which includes a custom dynamic memory allocator (malloc/free) and simulates multi-level CPU caches with configurable policies and detailed statistics (Source 3, Source 4).
4.  Achieved academic excellence at IIT Roorkee with Grade 10 in Data Structures & Algorithms, Probability & Statistics, and Network Theory, and secured an All India Rank of 3564 in JEE Advanced 2024 (Source 2, Source 4).
5.  Possesses strong programming skills in C++, Python, and C, with expertise in ML & Data Science tools (TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn) and Systems & CS concepts (Memory Allocation, Cache Architecture), alongside leadership experience as a Branch Coordinator for the Student Mentorship Programme at IIT Roorkee (Source 2, Source 5).

Positions of Responsibility & Extra Curriculars 
Branch Coordinator, Student Mentorship Programme (SMP), IIT Roorkee 
• 
Acted as the primary liaison between seniors and first-year students of the branch; coordinated mentoring activities, addressed academic concerns,

modules.

Codeforces (saralgupta95): Maximum rating 1435, Best global rank 2110 (Div. 2 Round 1057) 
CodeChef (saralgupta95): Highest rating 1792 — Global Rank 44 in Starters 211 (Rated) 
Solved 90000+ problems across Codeforces, LeetCode, and GeeksforGeeks 
Strong proficiency in C++, with solid understanding of DSA (arrays, recursion, sorting, binary search, trees, graphs, dynamic programming) 
 Projects 
CNN Based House Price Prediction Model | IIT Roorkee 
• 
Built a CNN-based hybrid house price prediction model using satellite images + tabular features (R² ≈ 0.86). 
• 
Implemented custom multimodal training pipelines for synchronized image and tabular data. 
• 
Automated satellite image acquisition via ArcGIS REST API, enabling large-scale geospatial data collection for CNN training. 
•

• 
Built a custom dynamic memory allocator (malloc/free) using an emulated sbrk interface. 
• 
Simulated multi-level CPU caches (L1/L2/L3) with configurable block size, associativity, and replacement policies. 
• 
Instrumented detailed cache statistics (hits, misses, access patterns) to analyze memory performance. 
Technologies: C, Memory Allocation, Cache Architecture, Pointers, Low-level Systems Programming 
Project Repository : https://github.com/saralgupta09/memory-simulator
